reference: I was hit on the shin, above the ankle, with a softball over a week ago. The bruising seems to finally be improving, but I still have severe pain when walking after moments of rest, although it does improve after the initial steps. There is a knot in the center of the bruising. Is it possible to have a fracture?
text: I just hit on a friend, a dozen years ago, with a softball with her at each other. The bruising seems to finally be improving, but I still have to do a training on how to make a name for myself. I know it doesn't seem like it makes a sense. The rules do not mean someone could beat me. Is it possible to have a factory?
